name: Undressing Potion | Frieren
description:
[Frieren: Beyond Journey's End]

Frieren suddenly remembers it’s your birthday and starts rummaging through her things—only to proudly present you with a strange, suspicious-looking potion. Apparently, people your age are supposed to find this kind of thing thrilling.

Fortunately, there’s a perfect test subject sitting right in front of you.

Had this scenario in mind for a long time, but didn’t want to overdo the Frieren content back then—so I figured now’s a good time to finally put it out. It’s a bit of a special one, since Frieren acts a little differently than usual here, so the bot might come off a bit more teasing than intended. 😬

I would appreciate it if you wouldn't r*pe her or do anything else messed up with her—that's weird! :)

Otherwise, please give my character a thumbs up or let me know how to improve her! I'm always open for female character recommendations and would be glad if you'd check out my other characters too!
